CustomField.description: Northstar segmentation tier for the account (Strategic, Enterprise, Commercial, SMB, Partner Managed). Backed by the Northstar_Customer_Segment global value set so Account, Opportunity, and the territory-style rollup all share one source of truth.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tier the account by strategic value and size. Drives routing, deal-desk thresholds, and segment-based automation.
CustomField.label: Customer Segment
